title: iberis ciliata var. vinetorum
intro: Iberis ciliata var. vinetorum, also known as Sweet Rocket, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, cough, and cold. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits like reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sweet Rocket is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
